g.title: action.emergency_closing_hold:emergency_closing->action.emergency_closing:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (emergency_closing) REFERENCES action.emergency_closing(id) ON DELETE CASCADE DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: action.emergency_closing_hold:hold->action.hold_request:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (hold) REFERENCES action.hold_request(id) ON DELETE CASCADE DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED
